creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 155741
patch

- Modify deskutils/kdepim4 to install libkleo headers.  This basically reverts http://websvn.kde.org/?view=revision&revision=1070773 (Linux distros have done something similar)
- Let net-im/kopete-kde4 depend on kdepim4 to enable the cryptography plugin
- Remove dependencies from kopete-kde4 for protocols that are no longer supported (libjingle and MSN/WLM)
